canonical_definition: A Spanish-language dataset of 45,416 sentences created by high-school teachers and students in Latin America to evaluate social biases in LLMs, organized by school subject and annotated for intersectional demographic biases.
papers: SMART: Simulated Students Aligned with Item Response Theory for Question Difficulty Prediction
